title: ResolutionEvent
description: 最近切换 feed entry. ADAPTER-OWNED: our adapter classifies per-source outcomes and emits these; the engine's own usage feed stays disabled because it leaks inbound keys (S1 gap ②). Redaction invariant: no credential material, no raw upstream error bodies.

reason.description: Canonical error classification lives in the adapter (S1 gap ①): param/protocol/tool-compat errors surface to the caller and never produce switch events.

billing_note.description: drives the gold dot in frame 01r

examples.human_zh: Claude Code:Claude Pro 本周期额度用完 → 已切到 Anthropic API Key(按量)
examples.human_en: Claude Code: Claude Pro cycle quota exhausted → switched to Anthropic API Key (metered)
